parameters.content: Sprint 15 - imported via POST /api/n8n/workflows/import/conversation-routing, then triggered via POST /api/n8n/workflows/conversation-routing/trigger, which calls this workflow's Webhook node. Still placeholder business logic (no downstream nodes) - only the trigger mechanism is real.

meta.name: Conversation Routing
meta.description: Placeholder for a future inbound-message routing workflow. Trigger mechanism (webhook) is real; no business logic implemented.
